hero_headline: Transform Your Fireplace. Elevate Your Outdoor Space.
hero_subtext: From stunning fireplace remodels to custom fire pits, BBQ islands, and luxury outdoor living — we connect you with licensed specialists who deliver exceptional craftsmanship.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.quote: We wanted a fireplace that looked custom instead of builder-grade. The difference after the remodel was night and day — it completely transformed the entire room. Couldn't be happier.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.quote: Our backyard finally feels like a space we actually use. The fire feature, seating area, and outdoor kitchen all came together beautifully. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: Jennifer & Mark T.
testimonials.quote: From the first call to the final walkthrough, the experience was seamless. They understood exactly what we wanted and delivered beyond our expectations. Highly recommend.
